title: Useful Poison
description: Useful Poison — a Minecraft mod that allows poisonous potatoes to be composted, turning them into bone meal and making farming more efficient and resourceful.
body:
Useful Poison is a mod that turns poisonous potatoes from useless junk into a valuable resource. Now you can place them in a composter to produce bone meal, increasing farming efficiency and making better use of your harvest.

✨ Features
Poisonous potatoes can be composted.

Balanced chance of bone meal output, matching rare agricultural resources.

Saves chest space: no more idle poisonous potatoes.

Perfect for players who enjoy using every item rationally and minimizing waste.

🎯 Why You Need It
Adds realism and logic: even poisonous plants can be recycled.

Makes farming more flexible and rewarding.

Simplifies resource management, especially on large farms.
